summary: A brief tweet by Ian Goodfellow highlighting 4.5 years of rapid progress in Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) for face generation, accompanied by links to five foundational research papers.

signature_quotes.text: 4.5 years of GAN progress on face generation.
signature_quotes.context: Tweeted alongside five arXiv links documenting the rapid visual improvement of GAN-generated faces from 2014 to 2018.
